message:
feat(abi-tests): expand err_abi test coverage from 17 to 26 tests

Add tests for vwarn/vwarnx with format strings, warn with additional
errno values (EACCES, ENOMEM, EIO, ENOSYS), rapid-fire warn/warnx
exercise, and alternating errno changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
